name: ESPEY MFG & ELECTRONICS CORP
business: ESPEY MFG & ELECTRONICS CORP designs and manufactures power supplies, transformers, and subassemblies for military and defense applications. The company sells to defense prime contractors and the U.S. Department of Defense. Its products include shipboard transformers, power distribution panels, power systems for combat vehicles, and power systems for aircraft radar and missile platforms.

exposures.sentence: Our sales strategy continues to focus on the long-standing relationships we have with many of the leading defense prime contractors.
